lines: Cyrus palms the freight scale until its needle settles.
"Return shelf is honest today. Everything on it has disappointed one owner already."

choices.label: Ask what makes the rear store bonded

lines: "A crew signs goods against a route. When the cart fails to return, the signature walks home and sits down with the household."
He nods toward the cage. "Darius keeps purifier salt back there. I sell what has already done its damage."

choices.label: Ask Cyrus to price the damage
Step away from the bonded cage

lines: "Cannot. The scale only weighs what came back."
